Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class ArrayTypeCondition

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.ArrayTypeCondition
All Implemented Interfaces:
VariableCondition
public final class ArrayTypeCondition extends VariableConditionAdapter
This variable condition checks if an instantiation is an array.
Since:
2006-12-03

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ArrayTypeCondition(SchemaVariable var, boolean negated)
    creates an instance of this condition checking if an instantiation of a schema variable is an array or not

  • Constructor Details

    • ArrayTypeCondition

      public ArrayTypeCondition(SchemaVariable var, boolean negated)
      creates an instance of this condition checking if an instantiation of a schema variable is an array or not
      Parameters:
      var - the SchemaVariable to be checked
      negated - if the result is to be negated upon finding

  • Method Details

    • check

      public boolean check(SchemaVariable var, SVSubstitute candidate, SVInstantiations svInst, Services services)
      Description copied from class: VariableConditionAdapter
      checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
      Specified by:
      check in class VariableConditionAdapter
      Parameters:
      var - the template Variable to be instantiated
      svInst - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
      services - the program information object
      Returns:
      true iff condition is fulfilled
